top.title: 'Fingers on the trigger': Deadly warnings for Iranians being urged to take action
top.summary: Iran's police chief has warned that his forces would treat anyone taking to the streets "at the enemy's request" as an enemy.

top.title: China approves 'ethnic unity' law requiring minorities to learn Mandarin
top.summary: The law states that children should be taught Mandarin before kindergarten, until the end of high school.

top.title: Epstein used modelling agent to recruit girls, Brazilian women tell BBC
top.summary: Modelling agent used businesses to recruit girls and arrange US visas to visit Jeffrey Epstein, Brazilian women tell BBC.

top.title: Lloyds, Bank of Scotland and Halifax apps showed customers other users' transactions
top.summary: The Lloyds Banking Group customers reported being able to view payments and charges from other sources.

top.title: What role has cyber warfare played in Iran?
top.summary: Militaries are often cagey about their cyber activities. But the US has hinted at the role it has played.

top.title: Social media firms asked to toughen up age checks for under-13s
top.summary: Instagram, Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube and Roblox are among the platforms UK regulators say aren't putting children's safety at the heart of their products.
